title: 3D Spatial Pattern Matching
abstract: arXiv:2606.26465v1 Announce Type: cross  Abstract: Spatial pattern matching is the process of matching query entities and constraints with database entities and relations. It has many applications, including similar region search, housing market search, landmark search, and road network matching. To our knowledge, all existing spatial pattern matching approaches frame the problem in a 2 dimensional space, where entities lie in a cartesian plane and relationships defined between them are contained in 2 dimensions. However, this problem framing has significant limitations when searching for real world entities that have height in addition to position. To address this limitation, we extend spatial pattern matching to 3 dimensions and provide a generalized definition of the problem. We describe a subgraph matching algorithm capable of resolving 3D spatial patterns over distance relations and release two 3D spatial pattern matching datasets, one synthetic and one containing real 3D building

Title: 3D Spatial Pattern Matching
Abstract: arXiv:2606.26465v1 Announce Type: cross  Abstract: Spatial pattern matching is the process of matching query entities and constraints with database entities and relations. It has many applications, including similar region search, housing market search, landmark search, and road network matching. To our knowledge, all existing spatial pattern matching approaches frame the problem in a 2 dimensional space, where entities lie in a cartesian plane and relationships defined between them are contained in 2 dimensions. However, this problem framing has significant limitations when searching for real world entities that have height in addition to position. To address this limitation, we extend spatial pattern matching to 3 dimensions and provide a generalized definition of the problem. We describe a subgraph matching algorithm capable of resolving 3D spatial patterns over distance relations and release two 3D spatial pattern matching datasets, one synthetic and one containing real 3D building
translated_abstract: 空间模式匹配是将查询实体和约束与数据库实体及关系进行匹配的过程。该技术具有广泛的应用，包括相似区域搜索、住房市场搜索、地标搜索以及道路网络匹配。据我们所知，所有现有的空间模式匹配方法都将问题限定在二维空间中，其中实体位于笛卡尔平面上，实体间的关系也局限于二维空间。然而，当搜索具有高度属性的真实世界实体时，这种问题框架存在显著局限性。为解决这一局限，我们将空间模式匹配扩展至三维空间，并提出了该问题的广义定义。我们描述了一种能够基于距离关系解析三维空间模式的子图匹配算法，同时发布了两个三维空间模式匹配数据集：一个为合成数据集，另一个包含真实三维建筑数据。
tldr: 本文首次将空间模式匹配从二维扩展到三维，提出了广义定义和子图匹配算法，并发布了两个三维空间模式匹配数据集，从而突破了传统二维框架在处理具有高度属性的真实世界实体时的局限性。
en_tdlr: This paper extends spatial pattern matching from 2D to 3D for the first time, proposes a generalized definition and a subgraph matching algorithm, and releases two 3D spatial pattern matching datasets, overcoming the limitations of traditional 2D frameworks when dealing with real-world entities that have height attributes.
